narrative:
Caldwell Ex Vill Sd (Noble) exempted village school district has 3,947 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.4 percentage points.
